series_metadata.series_title: OHIO EST. SCHOOL DISTRICT INCOME TAX DECLARATION
series_metadata.series_description: This form is used by individuals to fiule and pay their estimated school district income tax.

retention_rules.disposition: Microform: 4 years from date filed then destroy ; Paper: 2 years from date filed then microfilm and destroy paper copy, Microform: Burn ; Paper: Burn
